meaning: adj.利西亚的 利西亚人的 利西亚语的
examples: Nicholas resided in the ancient Lycian town of Myra, located in Byzantine Anatolia.
An ancient Lycian city of southern Asia Minor. A major seaport, it was one of the chief cities of the region.
Scholarly support includes important editorial punctuation marks, as well as the Carian, Lycian, and Lydian scripts, and the Phaistos disc symbols.
Life in Olympos, one of the 23 ancient Lycian towns, some 100 km from Antalya, is simple.
The Lycian Way offers a precious opportunity to genuinely encounter the landscape and people of this region.
